creator: vmagerya@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 144835
gnu-unifont-7.0.03.diff

Update x11-fonts/gnu-unifont and x11-fonts/gnu-unifont-ttf
from 6.3.20140214 to 7.0.03.

Note that port's current version is "20140214", but since
the upstream doesn't add date to it's version, POREPOCH bump
is needed.

Redprots logs are at [1].

[1] https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140721111801-45016/
